title: pteris aurata
intro: Pteris aurata, also known as the golden brake fern, is a species of fern native to Asia and Australia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pteris aurata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support digestive health, making it a popular remedy for various ailments. Pteris aurata can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
